ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The The Distribution Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Nov-19-2019 Continued To Dec-17-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on December 17, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why they failed to report on status of the reserve. Status of distribution of the reserve is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-15-2019 Continued To May-29-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jesko Onken appeared by telephone for Kathleen Day-Seiter (present).

Mr. Onken stated that he has a declaration with regard to the Accountant's fees, that he has not filed it yet, that it was a complicated accounting due to dividends and security holdings, and that the Accountant already had all of the information because she also did the income taxes which were fairly extensive. Mr. Onken also requested that the fees for the accounting preparing be paid by the estate, addressed fees stating that he charges $500.00 per hour, that properties were sold, that the Personal Representative dealt with preparation of the properties, that she also dealt with leasing them, etc. The Court noted that the statutory fees are quite high. Ms. Day-Seiter stated that she will file the declaration today. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is continued to May 29, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of the declaration.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
